features.name: indexed part-select on multi-dimensional unpacked array
features.description: Code should include an indexed part-select (+:) expression applied to a multi-dimensional unpacked array, where the base index is a variable expression and the width is a constant

features.name: sub-32-bit operands in indexed part-select base expression
features.description: Code should include an indexed part-select where the base expression is an arithmetic operation on sub-32-bit operands (e.g., a 4-bit variable added to a 4-bit constant), triggering a Verilator WIDTH warning

features.name: verilator lint_off WIDTH pragma around array slice
features.description: Code should include a /* verilator lint_off WIDTH */ pragma surrounding an array slice expression that uses sub-32-bit index operands, suppressing spurious width warnings for legal SV constructs
